claim_boundary.next_gate: If the no-loss gate fails, add a deterministic fallback contract that chooses between the generic mapping and automatic candidates without reading validation.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: Verifier acceptance, causal hardware performance, readout mitigation, current calibration, provider access, hardware execution, protocol soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or new B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Design-separated validation of a family-agnostic deterministic mapping rule against the historical automatic-layout exposure baseline.

requirements.label: four generic mapping rules enumerate all injections
design selection is isolated from validation
four new validation circuit families are materialized
all 12 validation groups have complete ten-seed ledgers
route and exact-QASM invariance are measured for every group
all 120 constrained circuits replay in a fresh process
automatic-baseline no-loss verdict is evaluated without promotion
verifier acceptance, mitigation, calibration, and hardware remain excluded
no soundness, advantage, BQP, or new credit is claimed

title: B4/B8 R134 family-agnostic deterministic mapping rule
